hero.description: A private space to talk, dream, and experience the moments you only imagine. No feeds. No followers. No one else.

moments.heading: The conversation you've been meaning to have
moments.description: Every relationship has dreams that stay unsaid and date nights that stay unplanned. Parfect turns them into messages, plans, and memories.

miss.title: For the couple who miss each other
miss.text: Even in the same house. Parfect gives you a place where it's only ever the two of you.

parents.title: For the parents who forgot date night
parents.text: Bucket list, babysitter, calendar — the logistics handled, so the romance isn't.

curious.title: For the ones still curious
curious.text: Gentle prompts help you say the things you've been meaning to say. At your pace.

messages.0: Remember that little beach town we said we'd run away to? 🏝
messages.1: Still on my list. Right next to "slow dance in the kitchen".
messages.2: Added both to our bucket list. Sitter's booked for Saturday…

appPreview.heading: Your relationship, in one app
appPreview.description: Swipe through the tabs couples use every day — chat, fantasies, and the plans you make together.

pillars.heading: Built the way your relationship actually works
pillars.description: Talk, share, and make it real — the same journey you'll follow inside the app.

chat.title: Talk like it's only you two
chat.description: A private thread that's just yours. Set messages to disappear, speak freely, and stay close even when you're apart.

fantasies.title: Share what you imagine
fantasies.description: Send a fantasy or ask for one. Gentle prompts help you open up, and "not right now" is always okay.

highlights.1: Ask or share at your own pace
highlights.2: Graduate shared dreams to your bucket list

together.title: Make the moments real
together.description: Turn sparks into a shared bucket list, plan date nights, even line up a sitter — together.

features.heading: More than messaging
features.description: Thoughtful tools that help you check in, plan ahead, and protect what matters — without the noise of social media.

checkin.title: Weekly check-ins
checkin.description: Reflect together with thoughtful questions — revealed side by side when you're both ready.

calendar.title: Shared calendar
calendar.description: Never miss an anniversary. Plan date nights and track the moments that matter.

lock.title: App lock & biometrics
lock.description: PIN lock and biometric protection keep your relationship private on your device.

constellation.title: Connection growth
constellation.description: Watch your constellation grow as you share moments and build your story together.

shield.title: Privacy-first design
shield.description: Content-free notifications, pause controls, and clear data policies.

rings.title: Made for two
rings.description: Pair once with an invite code. No feeds, no followers, no one else.

howItWorks.heading: From first message to date night
howItWorks.description: Getting started takes less than two minutes. Pair with your partner and start building the relationship you both want.

0.title: Download & pair
0.description: Get the app, create your account, and invite your partner with a private code. Under two minutes.

1.title: Talk, share, dream
1.description: Chat privately, explore fantasies with gentle prompts, and build a bucket list together.

2.title: Improve your relationship
2.description: Turn ideas into date nights, coordinate the details, and celebrate what brings you closer.

sofa.alt: Couple cuddled on the sofa smiling at a phone together
sofa.caption: Closer every evening

together.alt: Couple walking together along a softly lit path at dusk
together.caption: The next step is yours

testimonials.heading: It's already working for couples like you

featured.quote: We've been together six years and talk every single day — but Parfect is the first place we actually say things. It's like we found a room in our house we didn't know was there.
featured.alt: Hanna & Viktor, a happy couple laughing together

0.quote: The prompts started conversations we'd been avoiding for years. Knowing 'not right now' is always okay made all the difference for us.

1.quote: Two kids, zero spontaneity — date night was a guilty wish. Now it's twice a month, and the sitter step means it actually happens.

2.quote: Different time zones, same ritual. The daily question keeps us inside each other's day, and the bucket list is our reunion countdown.

3.quote: After 31 years of marriage we assumed we knew everything about each other. We didn't. It feels playful again — that surprised us both.

privacy.heading: Your relationship deserves a safe space
privacy.description: Parfect is built for intimacy, not exposure. No social feeds, no strangers — and privacy controls you can actually understand.

0.title: End-to-end encryption
0.description: Optional E2EE for chat text. Your intimate conversations stay between you two.

1.title: Content-free notifications
1.description: Push alerts never reveal what your partner said — just that they reached out.

2.title: You're always in control
2.description: Pause contact, unlink, or delete your account anytime. Clear policies, no surprises.

3.title: App lock & biometrics
3.description: PIN and biometric protection keep your relationship private on your device.

cta.heading: Your next step starts here
cta.description: This is for us. Download Parfect and begin the conversation that brings you closer — one message, one dream, one date night at a time.
cta.availability: Available on iOS and Android · Free download

0.question: What is Parfect?
0.answer: Parfect is a private couples app that combines intimate chat, fantasy prompts, date planning, and relationship milestones in one warm, secure space made for two.

1.question: Is Parfect private?
1.answer: Yes. Parfect is built for couples only — pair with an invite code, use optional end-to-end encryption, app lock with biometrics, and content-free push notifications. See our privacy policy for details.

2.question: Who is Parfect for?
2.answer: Parfect is designed for committed couples aged 18+ who want to strengthen their relationship through meaningful communication, shared experiences, and intentional intimacy.

schema.organizationDescription: A private couples app for intimate chat, shared fantasies, and turning dreams into real date nights.
schema.appDescription: Just the two of you. A private couples companion for intimate chat, fantasies, date planning, and relationship growth.
schema.websiteDescription: Download Parfect — the private app for couples who want to talk intimately, share dreams, and make them real.
